title: Using Excel Xlookup formula in monday

posts.author: benwassink (Ben Wassink)
posts.cookedHtml:
Since I want to use data from other lines when mass mailing, I actually need an Xlookup option like we all know in Excel.

Like the formula below, what I 'm using for the yellow cell.
=XLOOKUP(C4 & "Supply Chain"; C:C & B:B; E:E)

image1122×221 16.7 KB

Now it turns out that Monday can’t handle this, so the options in Monday fall short again anyway.

Do you have a solution for this or do you agree?
Comment or vote!
